content_body: This cabin was awesome!  The six of us had an amazing time.  We cooked amazing meals, drove our new jeep around the mountains, and we played hide and seek.  I suggest that you as well!  I'm pretty sure we are all sad to leave today.  As we drive our 8 hour drive home to Florida, I'm sure we will talk about our awesome adventure!  Great pool table, great gazebo, and awesome fire pit.  Thanks for a fantastic time!
title: A Serendipity Christmas
